function.name: get_pricing
function.description: Returns pricing information for SunCulture products. Use this when a caller asks how much a system costs, what the deposit is, how the PAYGO/Lipa Polepole financing works, or about the Refer and Earn program. Always use this tool for pricing — never guess or estimate prices.

query_type.description: The pricing query type. Use 'all_products' for a full price list, 'product_price' for a specific product's price, 'paygo_explanation' to explain how Lipa Polepole financing works, 'deposit_info' for deposit amounts, 'refer_and_earn' for the referral program details.

product_code.description: The internal product code to look up a specific price. Optional — use when the caller has asked about a specific product. Valid codes: csd_rm2s, csd_rm2ck, csd_rm2s_max, csd_surface_pump, falcon_rm2ck, falcon_sp_max, csb_rm2, csb_rm2_tv, csb_rm2_drip, csb_rm2_drip_tv, csb2_rm2s, csb2_rm2ck, csb2_surface_pump, csb1_swapout, csb2_upgrade.
